title: ⚔ Tachi Beverly ⚔
description: a resource pack that swaps sword textures for Tachis
body:
# Tachi Beverly
this is a resource pack that adds tachis/katanas to the game

all sword types have been replaced by Tachis

# in Game Showcase

![demonstration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iGW7kd0q/images/d71939c80d9f80c5dde16b414705d351a0bc6501.png)
